title: Data Scientist
description: Develop machine learning models and perform statistical analysis on large datasets. Work with Python, pandas, scikit-learn, and TensorFlow to build predictive models and data pipelines.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design, train, and deploy machine learning models at scale. Experience with deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch and TensorFlow required. MLOps and model deployment knowledge a plus.

title: Full Stack Web Developer
description: Build and maintain modern web applications using React on the frontend and Node.js or Django on the backend. RESTful API design and database management required.

title: Backend Developer
description: Design scalable backend services and APIs using Python or Java. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and containerization technologies preferred.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain data pipelines and ETL processes. Work with big data tools like Spark and Kafka. Cloud data warehouse experience with Snowflake or BigQuery preferred.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Create beautiful and accessible user interfaces using React and TypeScript. Strong knowledge of CSS, HTML, and modern frontend tooling. Experience with Figma for design handoff.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure. Implement CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions. Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform required.

title: NLP / AI Research Engineer
description: Research and develop natural language processing solutions. Build text classification, NER, and language models using Transformers, Hugging Face, and PyTorch.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor and protect organizational systems from threats. Conduct vulnerability assessments, penetration testing, and incident response. SIEM tool experience preferred.

title: Android Developer
description: Develop and publish high-quality Android mobile applications. Strong Kotlin skills required. Experience with REST APIs, Firebase, and agile development practices.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Build dashboards and reports using Power BI and Tableau. Strong SQL and Excel skills required. Work closely with stakeholders to deliver actionable insights from data.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Design enterprise cloud architectures on AWS and GCP. Lead migrations, cost optimization, and security best practices. Deep knowledge of microservices and serverless architectures.
